title: Pagination, Filtering, Links, Rate Limits, Versioning, and Resumable Work · Go Client Systems · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for pagination, filtering, links, rate limits, versioning, and resumable work, producing resumable rate-aware API traversal. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http resumable rate-aware API traversal and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners prog…
objectives: Traverse offset, page-number, cursor, and link pagination while detecting repeats, gaps, and termination. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Encode repeated parameters, arrays, dates, sorting, and filters according to the API contract without manual concatenation. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Coordinate server guidance, local quotas, concurrency, backoff, and caller priorities without synchronized bursts. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Pagination Models
steps.instruction:
debug case — Go incident collection agent follows cursor c3, repeated link c3, and rate limit 30/minute while records change between pages. Encode filters, detect loops, checkpoint stable identity, resume after failure, and avoid duplicates or gaps. Competency probe: Traverse offset, page-number, cursor, and link pagination while detecting repeats, gaps, and termination. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Pagination Models trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Pagination Models.

For Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Pagination Models, keep Pagination Models connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

For Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Pagination Models, challenge the documented misconception with request, response, fault, policy, and transfer evidence: Incrementing a page number until an empty array is universally correct pagination. This remains false for Go 1.26 net/http.
